guide.hero_text: Learn about each module and the recommended workflow to get started quickly.
guide.hero_inline_links: Continue browsing:Go to Library/Back to Overview
guide.step_1_desc: Upload a PDF and the system will automatically parse and extract figures.
guide.step_2_desc: Filter and browse papers, click into details to view full text and figures.
guide.step_3_desc: Browse figures from all papers, add tags or write notes for each figure.
guide.step_4_desc: Write down your reading insights for easy searching and review later.
guide.step_5_desc: Ask AI questions about the full text and figures to deepen understanding.
guide.feature_overview_desc: Shows total papers, parsing progress, accumulated figures and notes, and recently updated papers.
guide.feature_library_desc: Filter and browse papers, click into details to view full text and figures.
guide.feature_figures_desc: Organize tags and notes by figure, managing knowledge from a visual perspective.
guide.feature_notes_desc: View paper notes and figure notes in one place, with searchable descriptions and AI analysis results.
guide.feature_tags_groups_desc: Groups categorize items (e.g. by project), tags provide multi-dimensional labels (e.g. by method); paper tags and figure tags are independent.
guide.feature_ai_desc: Feed full text and figures to AI to summarize, explain, and record key points.
